stemHtml: The (1) _____ shows the rate of change of the cabin altitude and the (2) _____ expresses the cabin pressure as an equivalent altitude in the international standard atmosphere.

options.a: (1) cabin vertical speed indicator; (2) cabin altimeter
options.c: (1) cabin altimeter; (2) cabin vertical speed indicator
options.d: (1) differential pressure gauge; (2) cabin vertical speed indicator
